title: KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies!
